upa-saṃ-√gam Ā. -gacchate, to approach together, join in approaching,  ŚBr. ;  BhP. ;
to unite, join,  MBh. ;
to go or come near,  MBh. ;  BhP. ;  Bhag. ;
to enter into any condition or state,  MBh. xiii.
